scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a clear, achievable time commitment (15 minutes a day).
- Breaks down the learning process into manageable, practical steps tailored to Supernova's methodology.
- Highlights key Supernova features like the AI tutor and real-life speaking situations.
- Ends with a warm, encouraging call to action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट में
Confident English बोलना सीखें [Learn to speak confident English in just 15 minutes a day]
3 min
आसान सवालों से Warm-up [Warm-up with easy questions]
4 min
Supernova AI Tutor के साथ बातचीत [Conversation with Supernova AI Tutor]
3 min
अपनी Pronunciation सुधारें [Improve your pronunciation]
5 min
Real-life situations के लिए English [English for real-life situations]
आज ही शुरू करें [Start today]
